sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and GL > '3000000'
Update TransX set Amt1 = coalesce(Amt4,0), Amt2 = coalesce(Amt5,0), Amt3 =coalesce(Amt6,0) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and not Co like '599%'
update TransX set Amt1 = coalesce(Amt1,0), Amt2 = coalesce(Amt2,0), Amt3 = coalesce(Amt3,0) where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and ('[yyyy-mm-dd]' <> '2022-01-31'  or Co like '599%')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((GL like '6%' and not GL like '682%') or (GL like '449%') ) and substring(CC,4,1) in ('E','I')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL = '2880000' and not TTY = '803'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[version]' = 'First' and Co like '599%'
update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Co like '599%'
update TransX set ProdCode = 'U1801' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4'  and GL in ('1560001','1560002','2150001')
update TransX set ProdCode = 'U1804' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4'  and GL = '2150000'
update TransX set ProdCode = 'U1806' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4'  and GL = '1560000'
update TransX set ProdCode = 'U1892' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4'  and GL = '4600000'
update TransX set  BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set  BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set  BusCat = '20' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '2%'
update TransX set  BusCat = '30' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
update TransX set PC = '570' + Co + '000' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TTY = '100' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY <> ''  and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31'

Update x set Amt1 = round(Amt1*c.Rate,2), Crcy = 'USD' From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Exp' and y.Descr = x.Crcy inner join CrcyRates c on c.Crcy = x.Crcy and c.Typ = 'S' and c.EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]' where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]-data2' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, BusCat, TTY, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '3870002' as GL, Crcy, PC, TP, '' as BusCat, '640' as TTY, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' group by KeyID, Co,  Crcy, PC, TP)

Update t set Flex1 = m.Field3, Flex2 = m.Field4, Flex3 = m.Field5, Flex4 = m.Field6 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Rev Offset' and m.Descr = 'any' and m.Field1 = 'any' and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Flex1 is NULL and not '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31'

Update t set Flex1 = m.Field3, Flex2 = m.Field4, Flex3 = m.Field5, Flex4 = m.Field6 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Rev Offset' and t.GL = m.Descr and t.BusCat = m.Field1 and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Flex1 is NULL and not '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and not t.TTY = '100'

Update t set Flex1 = m.Field3, Flex2 = m.Field4, Flex3 = m.Field5, Flex4 = m.Field6 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Rev Offset' and t.GL = m.Descr and t.BusCat = m.Field1 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Flex1 is NULL and m.Field2 = '' and not '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31'

Update TransX set Flex1 = '2851017', Flex2 = '', Flex3 = '', Flex4 = '1'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL and (GL like '449%' or (GL like '6%' and not GL like '682%' and not GL = '6420003')) and not '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31'
Update t set Flex1 = '1099917', Flex2 = '', Flex3 = '', Flex4 = '1' from TransX t where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1610000' and Co = '3270' and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' in ('2022-06-30','2022-09-30')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, PC, TP, BusCat, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3) (Select KeyID, Co, Flex1 as GL, Crcy, Flex3 as TTY, PC, TP, Flex2 as BusCat, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3, Flex1,Flex2,Flex3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 in ('1','2'))

Update t set Amt2 = round(Amt2*r1.Rate/r2.Rate,2) from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.Field3 = 'convert' and m.ID = 'Co' and m.Descr = t.Co inner join CrcyRates r1 on r1.Crcy = m.Field2 and r1.Typ = 'S' and r1.EffDate = (select max(EffDate) from (select EffDate from CrcyRates where Typ = 'S' and Crcy = 'GBP' and EffDate <= '[yyyy-mm-dd]') a) inner join CrcyRates r2 on r2.Crcy = m.Field4 and r2.Typ = 'S' and r2.EffDate = r1.EffDate where t.KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, BusCat, Assgnmt, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '1099917' as GL, Crcy, '' as TTY, TP, PC, '' as BusCat, Assgnmt, Flex1, '' as Flex2, '' as Flex3, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('4410000','4419900','4410001','4419901') group by KeyID, Co, Crcy, TP, PC,Assgnmt, Flex1)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Assgnmt) (Select '[batchID]-data3' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, (case when Co like '599%' then '' else 'x' + Flex1 + 'x' + Flex2 + 'x' + Flex3 end) as Assgnmt from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, BusCat, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '1099917' as GL, Crcy, '900' as TTY, '' as TP, PC, '' as BusCat, Assgnmt, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Assgnmt in ('x4419901x20x','x6829900xx','x6829901xx') and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' in ('2022-12-31') group by KeyID, Co, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set Assgnmt = replace(Assgnmt,'x10x','x20x') where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and (Assgnmt like 'x551%x10x' or Assgnmt like 'x501%x10x')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150000' as GL, Crcy, PC,'607' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1804' as ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and GL = '4600000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150000' as GL, Crcy, PC,'600' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1804' as ProdCode, -Amt1, -Amt2 , -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and GL = '4600000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '1560000' as GL, Crcy, PC,'626' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1806' as ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and GL = '4610000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '1560000' as GL, Crcy, PC,'620' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1806' as ProdCode, -Amt1, -Amt2 , -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and GL = '4610000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150000' as GL, Crcy, PC,'607' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1804' as ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and GL = '5600000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150000' as GL, Crcy, PC,'602' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1804' as ProdCode, -Amt1, -Amt2 , -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and GL = '5600000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150001' as GL, Crcy, PC,'803' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1801' as ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and GL = '5600052')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150001' as GL, Crcy, PC,'603' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1801' as ProdCode, -Amt1, -Amt2 , -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and GL = '5600052')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '1560001' as GL, Crcy, PC,'627' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1801' as ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and GL = '5600067')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '1560001' as GL, Crcy, PC,'615' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1801' as ProdCode, -Amt1, -Amt2 , -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and GL = '5600067')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '1560002' as GL, Crcy, PC,'806' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1801' as ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and GL = '1560001' and TTY = '627')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '1560002' as GL, Crcy, PC,'803' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1801' as ProdCode, -Amt1, -Amt2 , -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and GL = '1560001' and TTY = '627')
update TransX set GL = '1560000', TTY = '626', ProdCode = 'U1806' where KeyID in ('[batchID]','[batchID]-data3') and GL = '2860000'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, m.Field1 as Co, t.GL, t.Crcy, t.PC,t.TTY, t.TP, t.BusCat, coalesce(t.Assgnmt,''), t.ProdCode, t.Amt1, t.Amt2 , t.Amt3 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Co' and m.Descr = t.Co where t.KeyID = '[batchID]-data3')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, BusCat, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '4398600' as GL, Crcy, '' as TTY, '' as TP, '5500000000' as PC, '' as BusCat, '' as Assgnmt, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy)
update TransX set TP = '2008' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1999901' and PC like '5702%'
update TransX set ProdCode = 'U1892', PTF = 'U3650' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4600000'
update TransX set PTF = 'U3650' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4610000'
update TransX set PTF = 'U3010' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '56%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), coalesce(ProdCode,''), coalesce(PTF,''), -Amt1,- Amt2 ,- Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4')
update TransX set Assgnmt = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[version]',1,3) = 'Net'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]-data4' as KeyID, '9999' as Co, 'filler' as GL, '' as Crcy, '' as PC, '' as TTY, '' as TP, '' as BusCat, '' as Assgnmt, '' as ProdCode, '' as PTF, 0 as Amt1, 0 as  Amt2 , 0 as  Amt3)
update TransX set BusCat = '20' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and BusCat = '' and GL like '18%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, coalesce(ProdCode,''), coalesce(PTF,''), round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '2' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, coalesce(ProdCode,''), coalesce(PTF,''))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, coalesce(ProdCode,''), coalesce(PTF,''), round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '1' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '2' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, coalesce(ProdCode,''), coalesce(PTF,''))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not PK = '1'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'IFRS-17 Reversal', SubProd = 'G23' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, PTF, Amt4,Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, PTF, Amt5,Amt2) values ('[batchID]',
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, PTF, Amt6,Amt3) values ('[batchID]',
